word: G198 - ἀκριβόω - akribóō - ak-ree-bo'-o - Enquire diligently

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
in secular writings, to know accurately, to do exactly to investigate diligently
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From the same as G196; to be exact, that is, ascertain: - enquire diligently.
